comment: Documented difference between Strudel's reference surface (tools/oracle/reference_golden.json) and Rudel's exposed names (rudel_lang::reference()). Every Strudel-documented name NOT exposed by Rudel must appear here with a category/reason; crates/rudel-lang/tests/reference_parity.rs asserts the diff equals exactly this set, so adding a name on either side forces an explicit decision. Categories tagged `unsupported` are intentional/architectural; those tagged `deferred` are genuine gaps owned by the cross-referenced FULL_STRUDEL.md item.

motion.reason: @strudel/motion browser DeviceMotion/DeviceOrientation sensor signals; no native sensor source (docs/UNSUPPORTED.md).

browser_input.reason: Browser-only input signals (mouse position, Web MIDI keyboard, key state); no native equivalent in the egui app.

draw_runtime.reason: Label/draw-lifecycle helpers; the realtime draw path never runs the Koto VM (FULL_STRUDEL.md draw items, docs/UNSUPPORTED.md). The pianoroll/punchcard/spiral/pitchwheel/wordfall/claviature visualizers, the scope/tscope/fscope/spectrum analyzer widgets (per-widget lock-free taps on the audio output), and the rescale/moveXY/zoomIn animate transforms are now exposed (inline widgets + x/y/w/h param transforms).

theme.reason: Strudel's full CodeMirror theme catalog is not ported; Rudel ships the strudel-dark/light palettes (FULL_STRUDEL.md theme item).

unsupported_package.reason: Browser-only / alternative-engine features and config setters with no native analog: Csound WASM, Web Speech, kabelsalat worklet (K/worklet), the FX effect-chain graph, the legacy RNG toggle, superdough gain-curve/polyphony setters, and runtime voicing-dictionary registration (docs/UNSUPPORTED.md, FULL_STRUDEL.md effects/voicings items).

query_path_callback.reason: Per-hap predicates evaluated in the query path, which the Koto VM cannot run there (it is not Send/Sync); tag exists only to feed filter (FULL_STRUDEL.md core/pattern.mjs item).

span_arg_internal.reason: TimeSpan-object variants that throw on a plain array upstream, i.e. internal helpers; the user-facing two-arg compress/focus/zoom are exposed (FULL_STRUDEL.md core/pattern.mjs item).

doc_artifact.reason: Names the reference oracle scrapes from jsdoc that are not live Strudel exports: `vlpf` appears only inside `register()`'s `@example`; `weave`/`weaveWith` are commented out in core/pattern.mjs (only the `@name` tags survive); `log` is the console/visualization method (`pat.log()` writes hap data to the side panel), part of the draw-runtime family (docs/UNSUPPORTED.md).
